buildCommand: npm run build && cp -r public/. dist/public/ 2>/dev/null || true && cp -r attached_assets dist/public/attached_assets 2>/dev/null || true && node_modules/.bin/esbuild server/vercel-entry.ts --bundle --packages=external --platform=node --format=esm --outfile=api/handler.js --tsconfig=tsconfig.json --external:bufferutil --external:utf-8-validate --external:fsevents --external:@google-cloud/storage
